testing_centers.notes: BOC-AT examination administered at Pearson VUE testing centers nationwide. Available year-round; schedule through the Pearson VUE BOC candidate portal.

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required. Name on ID must match BOC registration exactly.
exam_rules: No personal items, notes, or reference materials permitted. Computer-based format at Pearson VUE testing centers. Candidates must agree to the BOC Standards of Professional Practice.
renewal_options: BOC certification must be renewed every 2 years. 50 CEUs required per 2-year renewal cycle, including EBP and ethics requirements. Renew through the BOC candidate portal at bocatc.org.

prerequisites.description: Graduation from a CAATE-accredited Athletic Training program (master's degree required for programs transitioning to graduate entry; verify current CAATE requirements)

retake_policy.notes: 60-day waiting period between failed attempts. Maximum 6 lifetime attempts. Candidates who exhaust all attempts are permanently ineligible and must petition the BOC.

domains.name: Injury and Illness Prevention and Wellness Promotion

official_study_resources.title: BOC Exam Candidate Handbook
official_study_resources.notes: Official candidate handbook with content outline, eligibility, and scheduling information.

official_study_resources.title: BOC Practice Examination
official_study_resources.notes: Official practice examination available through the BOC portal.
